title: Vega
summary: A star system the archive names as a cradle of humanity's evolving lineage.
markdown:
**Vega** — a star in the Lyra constellation — appears in the archive as one of the cradles of
humanity's lineage. In the August 22, 2020 [Insectoid](/lore/insectoids/) session, Unimetrix 1
tells a questioner "your species is not here yet — still in the Vega star system, still evolving
into sentient level," and in the [Bigfoot](/lore/bigfoot/) session it speaks of "your ancestor
in the Vega star system."

Vega is closely tied to the [Lyrans](/lore/lyrans/) and the [Sirians](/lore/sirians/) in the
archive's genealogy — part of the ancestral star map from which Unimetrix 1 says humanity and
its neighbours descend.

As a place, Vega marks one of the archive's origin points: a home system in the deep past of the
long story Unimetrix 1 tells about where humanity comes from.
